title: Spaarke SSE Shared Definitions
description: Shared $defs referenced by all R2 SSE event schemas. Import via $ref.

SseEnvelope.description: Base envelope present on every R2 SSE event.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the event was generated on the server.

sessionId.description: Chat session ID that produced this event.

traceId.description: Distributed trace ID for correlating server-side logs (HttpContext.TraceIdentifier).

DocumentReference.description: A reference to a document known to the Spaarke platform.

documentId.description: Unique identifier of the document (SPE drive item ID or Dataverse record ID).

url.description: Direct URL to open the document.

RangeHighlight.description: A text range selection within a document for highlighting or citation purposes.

startOffset.description: Zero-based character offset of the highlight start (inclusive).

endOffset.description: Zero-based character offset of the highlight end (exclusive).

text.description: The highlighted text content (informational; client should verify against document).
